Short Description:
Building Ideas nace como productora de contenidos relacionados a las artes, la moda y el diseño.

Nuestro desafío arraiga  en la búsqueda de aquellos conceptos fundantes e inherentes a los proyectos y en la sinergia de los mismos. Mediante la integración del arte y el diseño como elementos transformadores y diferenciadores, se logra la integración entre partes indiferenciadas, acción que genera energía y armonía en las cosas. 

"Para encontrarte en lo infinito 
has de diferenciar para luego juntar." Goethe 

Éste es nuestro foco, nuestro objetivo, nuestro modus operandi. Nuestra manera de generar valor agregado y aportar autenticidad e idoneidad a las cosas que impulsamos.



Building Ideas was born as a project specified in the development of contents related to arts, fashion and design.
 
Our challenge makes root in searching those founding and inherent concepts of the projects and the synergy between them. Incorporating art and design -as transformer and differential elements- we achieve the integration between non differentiated parts, action that generates both energy and harmony in things.

"To find yourself in the infinite
you must differentiate to gather afterwards". Goethe

This is our focus, our target, our modus operandi. Our way to generate surplus and bring authenticity and genuineness in the things that we impulse.

Try Me es una empresa Argentina que se fundó en el año 1981 y desde entonces, se dedica al diseño, producción y comercialización de ropa femenina de moda. Luego de numerosos años de experiencia y desarrollo de productos orientados al gusto de las mujeres de nuestro país, Try Me ha logrado posicionarse en el mercado y es una de las marcas más queridas por el sexo femenino.
La calidad de las telas, su diseño adaptado a las últimas tendencias de la moda internacional, una muy buena confección de las prendas, y precios amigables es nuestra Filosofía. Los locales de Try Me, están ambientados con calidez, para que nuestras clientas se sientan cómodas. La incorporación de productos nuevos es constante, con lo cual nuestras clientas pueden renovar su look a diario, así la moda vive y se recrea en vos.
TRY ME, inspiración para el Alma.

Short Description:
Mattelsa is a premium streetwear brand based in Colombia, dedicated to creating a community that values life, sustainability, and high-quality clothing. The brand originated from an underground retail concept and has evolved to focus on quality and respect for both people and the planet. With 49 stores across Colombia and a presence in 27 countries, Mattelsa aims to connect with streetwear enthusiasts who appreciate ethical fashion.

The company specializes in premium streetwear made from high-quality, natural-origin materials. Its product offerings include oversized men's clothing, women's tops, jeans, and essential streetwear staples like t-shirts and hoodies. Mattelsa emphasizes durability in its designs to promote responsible consumption. Through its Regeneration Culture foundation, the brand reinvests 100% of its profits into projects that support environmental recovery and education, reflecting its commitment to sustainability and community development.

Billabong Argentina is a subsidiary of Billabong International Limited, an Australian company known for its surf and snowboard apparel and accessories. Established in 1973, Billabong Argentina operates within the clothing and apparel retail industry, employing around 282 people and generating annual revenue of $9.9 million. The company is a key player in the regional market, contributing to Billabong's presence in over 25 countries.

The company offers a wide range of surf and snowboard clothing and accessories for men, women, and children. Their product lineup includes board shorts, neoprene wetsuits, snowboard clothing, fashion tops, and various accessories like watches and backpacks. Billabong Argentina also features an online e-commerce platform, providing customers with flexible payment options. The brand is dedicated to quality and durability, appealing to surfers, snowboarders, and lifestyle consumers who appreciate both technical performance and fashion in action sports culture.

Short Description:
Como consecuencia de la gran competencia frente los mercados textiles  mundiales, el sector textil chileno se ha visto afectado generado una importante vacío en la oferta.

Desde Sago nace la necesidad de generar un proyecto creativo que dinamice el sector con una propuesta de diseño desde una perspectiva de producción local con un fuerte énfasis en la innovación.
SAGO Diseña y desarrolla proyectos textiles a través de los estampados, estos abarcan diversas técnicas.

Nos gusta combinar y experimentar con nuevos materiales integrando técnicas mas clásicas con otras mas artesanales, investigando con productos que nos permiten experimentar formulas mas actuales. Nuestros estampados no son replicables, cada proyecto y cada metro de tela es único. Eso nos hace diferenciarnos de los demás y que nuestro producto llegue a tener un carácter propio.
Desde Sago Estudio podemos trabajar proyectos de diseño personalizados adaptándonos diferentes desafíos.

Desde sago estudio realizamos diversos talleres sobre técnicas de estampados y trabajo textil, que abordan desde el gráfico de moda hasta la manufactura, tanto tradicionales como experimentales. Taller de colorido, tinturas, serigrafía o búsqueda de tendencias son algunos de los planteamientos para los cursos a desarrollar.

👔 M&K Dress for Success

🌱 Como miembros del Pacto Global de las Naciones Unidas, reafirmamos nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad, la igualdad de oportunidades y la innovación textil.
Creemos que la moda puede ser un motor de cambio: vestir con propósito es liderar con conciencia.

Las Oreiro is a women's fashion brand founded in 2007 by sisters Natalia and Adriana Oreiro. The brand specializes in clothing, accessories, and related products, primarily sold through its online store. Las Oreiro aims to provide stylish apparel suitable for various occasions, promoting empowerment and gender awareness among women.

The product range includes a variety of clothing items such as t-shirts, dresses, jackets, and jeans, as well as accessories like handbags, backpacks, and cosmetic bags. Short Description:
LA MARCA


AMPI VERA es una marca de moda contemporánea fundada en Buenos Aires, Argentina en el 2016. La marca se centra en la creación de prendas únicas y atemporales que fusionan diseño y calidad. El color es el sentido de todas sus colecciones. AMPI VERA es conocida por su estilo distintivo y su enfoque en la experimentación con colores y estampas. En cada colección se construye con una narrativa sólida que se basa en un concepto y un universo visual inspirado en el arte, el diseño y la creatividad.

AMPI VERA ofrece una variedad de prendas, desde básicos hasta abrigos y sastrería, todos caracterizados por su estilo único y atemporal.


PROPÓSITO


Como diseñadora de indumentaria, siento la necesidad de crear prendas que comuniquen, que tengan su propio lenguaje y una identidad visual definida. Lo más importante es que estas prendas inspiren a las personas a ser la mejor versión de sí mismas.

La esencia de la marca radica en potenciar la libertad, la audacia y la expresividad a través del indumento. A través de cada colección AMPI VERA invita a su comunidad a vivir con autenticidad y a expresarse sin restricciones.

Short Description:
Founded in 1938, Arlei is currently one of the largest exporters of crust leather in the world. The company began as a small vegetable sole leather trading house distributing goods to local footwear and handbag manufacturers, and gradually expanded with the construction of a vegetable tannery in Salta (northwestern Argentina) and a chrome/chrome free tannery in Santa Fe (northeastern Argentina), and later on its finishing plant and a cutting and sewing facility in Buenos Aires. Initially under the management of  its founder Mr. Arturo Leiser, and now continued by the following generation, Viviana and Alan Leiser, leading over 2000 employees, the company is acknowledged as one of the leading tanneries in South America.
The company's leather processing facilities use state of the art technology to process over nine thousand hides a day, 7 days a week, consuming around 22% of the total slaughter of Argentina hides, exporting a wide range of products to all five continents. Arlei is proud to be the first Argentine tannery to have certified
ISO14001, ISO 9001 y TS 16949.
The company complies with the strictest quality standards required by the industry leaders including automobile and furniture manufacturers worldwide

Short Description:
Established in Colombia in 1993, The Color Wear is a fashion company dedicated to the design, manufacture, and retail of women's clothing.

With stores in 12 different cities across the country, The Color Wear has garnered a strong national presence in the Colombian market and established itself as an industry leader. In 2018, the brand opened itself to the international market, and has ever since been shipping internationally to various locations across North, Central, and South America. 

The brand has its roots in the Colombian Caribbean coast, explaining its specialization in breathable and natural fabrics such as cotton, linen, and silk. These materials are used in the creation of casual and formal pieces for modern and stylish women who appreciate fashion, yet value the durability of a high-quality product.

The Color Wear shines for its unique approach to fashion: always maintaining a love for classics without sacrificing novelty and color. This creative way of interpreting fashion design, coupled with the unmatched quality of a 100% Colombian product, has allowed the brand to endure over time and become a symbol of style at a national and international level.

Short Description:
MAYDI is a contemporary and bespoke knitwear brand based in Argentina.
The brand was created in 2014, upon my return to Argentina, expressing my Franco-Argentine culture. The first question I asked myself when creating the brand was: what are the main resources that can be found in Argentina to create a brand that is 100% local?
I started investigating and discovered that Argentina is one of the main exporters of merino wool and other natural fibers. From the first moment, my purpose was to create sustainable products with a unique contemporary design. That is why, at MAYDI, we don't have stock; each piece is entirely handmade, using local raw materials. We open the doors to the world, showing the value of our garment and promoting handmade pieces crafted using traditional and autochthonous techniques. Along the way, I have had the pleasure of working with marvelous artisan women and weaver men. They have always worked from home since the beginning.
MAYDI uses only natural fibers and organic yarns in our hand-woven fabrics.
The timeless spirit of each piece manifests itself in a 100% contemporary and refined design, carried out through ancient techniques of hand-knitting, manual weaving-loom, and crochet. 
MAYDI, the Wildlife Friendly Enterprise Network (WFEN), and the Wildlife Conservation Society-Argentina (WCS) are pleased to announce the debut of Certified Wildlife Friendly™ fibers from Patagonia Argentina at Paris Fashion Week. Using luxurious merino wool produced by the "Patagonian Fibers with a Conscience" program from a sustainable rancher's cooperative called "Merino de Peninsula Valdés™" Wildlife Friendly™, the Merino Peninsula Valdés is based on the coexistence between ovine breeding for wool production purposes and the healthy population of wildlife.
MAYDI sets the quality bar very high, ensuring meticulous attention to detail in the entire creation process of each garment, handmade from start to finish.

Short Description:
We are a Peruvian ethical fashion company dedicated to showcasing the exceptional qualities of alpaca fiber, advocating for environmental care, and empowering knitting communities. We preserve traditional knitting techniques such as needles, crochet, pedal loom, and macramé, creating unique textures and sustainable pieces. We manage two business units:

Clio Brand: We design, knit, and export hand-knitted garments and accessories, blending the latest fashion trends into timeless pieces. Our products are made by urban and rural knitting communities in Peru using natural yarns such as baby alpaca, organic Pima and Tangüis cotton, and high-quality blends.

Clio Studio: We offer comprehensive services including yarn consulting, prototypes, production, quality control, labeling, packaging, and shipping paperwork. Our consulting and sourcing services aim to share our expertise with designers, companies, and brands worldwide, promoting the beauty of baby alpaca and cotton yarns and the talent of our knitters.

Short Description:
Caffarena is a Chilean company with a rich history dating back to 1888, when Blas Caffarena Chiozza arrived in Iquique. The company expanded to Santiago in 1920 and established its main operations in Maipú in 1969. By its 90th anniversary, Caffarena was being led by the fourth generation of the family.

Caffarena specializes in intimate apparel and clothing, with key products including panties, chemisettes, leggings, t-shirts, and swimwear. The company has a strong market presence in Chile, where its panties dominated 65% of the market by the late 20th century. Caffarena has also expanded internationally, with products featured in Victoria's Secret catalog in the United States and distribution in countries like Peru, Argentina, Uruguay, and Mexico. The first direct international store opened in Lima, Peru in 2019, and the company celebrated its 100th anniversary in 2020.

Short Description:
SAKE is a living laboratory where ancestral techniques, biomaterials, and ecosystems converge to redefine design and fashion. Founded after more than a decade of immersive research and collaboration across the Andes and Amazon, SAKE bridges ancestral intelligence with contemporary innovation to create fashion that is alive, reciprocal, and regenerative.

Our mission is clear: preserve and revitalize ancestral knowledge; develop biomaterials that extend the lifespan of ecosystems; strengthen community economies through fair, participatory, and regenerative models; and offer alternatives to extractive fashion by creating materials that embody life, territory, and memory.

Governance at SAKE is rooted in accountability, traceability, and reciprocity. For three consecutive years, we have been Fair Trade Certified, ensuring equitable pay, safe working conditions, and compliance with international labor standards. Production timelines, pricing, and innovation are co-defined with artisans and associations, guaranteeing both transparency and financial sovereignty. Growth follows ecological rhythms and cultural protocols, never exceeding what the land and people can sustain.

Each of our materials is developed in dialogue with territory and community: hand-spun alpaca and natural dyes with Pinchimuro in Cusco; native cotton and palm fibers with Shunku Warmi Kuna in San Martín; wild rubber with Eco Bosques Chazuta; paiche fish leather in Ucayali; and biodegradable vegetable-tanned hides with our Lima lab.

Our sustainability in practice engages more than 60 artisans, Indigenous leaders, and forest guardians. Programs such as the Caravana Andina support food security and agricultural sovereignty in the Andes, while Amazkin protects over 240 hectares of Amazon forest. Circular investments extend to greenhouses, clean water systems, health, and education.

We are a bridge between ancestral and contemporary worlds, proving that fashion can regenerate rather than extract.

Short Description:
Creada en 2013 e influenciados por el movimiento Skateboarding de principios del 2000, inspirados por la música underground en sus diferentes expresiones; Body Moving (Baile), DJ & mucho sabor. Nacidos con el ADN Latino, pero con una fuerte influencia en la cultura Street de Los Ángeles, con unos guiños a la moda Asiática & adaptaciones al más puro estilo minimalista, DYNAMO es la Rebel Crew que busca ser disruptiva y convertirse en referente para la moda streetwear actual, democratizándola y marcando la diferencia por medio de siluetas, tendencias & diseños con gráficas desde los básicos más puros y elementales hasta el color y sabor propio de nuestra ubicación geográfica, pasando por un futurismo tecnológico, & valiéndonos de diferentes técnicas de estampación y procesos en telas e índigos que nos permitan expresar toda nuestra esencia.

DYNAMO buscamos romper los estándares establecidos, apelamos a la irreverencia y le damos voz a los que representamos. Decimos con nuestras creaciones Io que muchos no se atreven a decir.

DYNAMO BRAND inicia en el año 2013 con el canal de ventas mayorista, cuyo objetivo en su momento fue suplir la demanda creciente de moda streetwear.

Se realiza la apertura de su primer tienda física en el año 2016 en la ciudad de Medellín, posteriormente, apertura tiendas en Cali y Barranquilla. Actualmente, contamos con 5 puntos de venta; Tres tiendas en Cali, una en Barranquilla y una en Medellín y se proyecta a abrir 4 tiendas más durante el segundo semestre del año 2022.
